title: FlatNet As Mobs
description: Members of the Flatnet Server as mobs
body:
Reskins popular players from the FlatNet server as mobs/entities

This a fun fan art pack for Minecraft

This project is still in a "WIP" phase

**REQUIRES [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) & [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)/OPTIFINE INORDER TO RENDER CUSTOM MODELS FOR CERTAIN MOBS**
